goal: exists(k0: M) { k0 = g(t) and f(t) * k0 = M.1 and k0 * f(t) = M.1 }
proof: function(x0: M) { not (g(t) = x0 and M.1 = f(t) * x0 and M.1 = x0 * f(t)) }(g(t))

let w0: T -> M satisfy { exists(k0: M) { w0(t) = k0 and M.1 = f(t) * k0 and M.1 = k0 * f(t) } }
let w1: M satisfy { w0(t) = w1 and M.1 = f(t) * w1 and M.1 = w1 * f(t) }
not exists(k1: M) { M.1 = f(t) * k1 and M.1 = k1 * f(t) }
let w2: M satisfy { w0(t) = w2 and M.1 = f(t) * w2 and M.1 = w2 * f(t) }
w0(t) = w2 and M.1 = f(t) * w2 and M.1 = w2 * f(t)
function(x0: M) { not (M.1 = f(t) * x0 and M.1 = x0 * f(t)) }(w2)
function(x0: M) { f(t) * x0 != M.1 or x0 * f(t) != M.1 }(w2)
